slots.archetype_policy: match lesson archetype and avoid sample-specific carryover
slots.validation_rule: Opening must invite student action or attention within two turns.

slots.template_mode_policy: density decreases from transcript to quick prep
slots.validation_rule: Task release must tell students what to do and what evidence matters.

slots.grade_band_policy: stage_1 sensory words; stage_2 evidence judgment; stage_3 analysis and viewpoint
slots.archetype_policy: visual_language and design lessons emphasize compare/name/evidence
slots.template_mode_policy: screen prompts use short cue words only
slots.validation_rule: Observation language must identify what students look for and how they report evidence.

slots.grade_band_policy: translate abstract question into student-facing inquiry
slots.archetype_policy: question must fit material, visual, culture, narrative, design, inquiry, or emotion archetype
slots.template_mode_policy: public and precision may include question chain; quick keeps one key question
slots.validation_rule: Question must change student thinking or action, not just restate the title.

slots.grade_band_policy: stage_1 one concrete follow-up; stage_2 ask for evidence; stage_3 ask for reason and improvement
slots.template_mode_policy: public has multiple follow-ups; daily/quick keep one or two
slots.validation_rule: Follow-up must send thinking back to observable evidence or next action.

slots.grade_band_policy: stage_1 watch one action; stage_2 watch method and reason; stage_3 watch strategy and transfer
slots.archetype_policy: material_technique lessons emphasize method and safety
slots.template_mode_policy: public full demonstration talk; quick bullet instruction
slots.validation_rule: Demo talk must tell students what to observe, not just what the teacher does.

slots.grade_band_policy: clear action, time, material, and success evidence
slots.template_mode_policy: screen prompt may show only action checklist
slots.validation_rule: Practice instruction must preserve student doing.

slots.archetype_policy: support aligns to material, visual, culture, narrative, design, inquiry, or emotion need
slots.template_mode_policy: daily/quick keep only most useful hint
slots.validation_rule: Scaffold must help students act, record, compare, or improve.

slots.grade_band_policy: stage_1 name concrete success; stage_2 name method/evidence; stage_3 name reasoning and improvement
slots.template_mode_policy: public includes variants; daily/quick use compact criteria cues
slots.validation_rule: Feedback must cite observable evidence, not say only 'good'.

slots.grade_band_policy: stage_1 short rhythmic summary; stage_2 method summary; stage_3 viewpoint/transfer summary
slots.template_mode_policy: quick may omit except final one-line summary
slots.validation_rule: Summary must connect previous student action to next learning move.

slots.grade_band_policy: short visible keywords suitable for grade band
slots.archetype_policy: cue words match task and evidence
slots.validation_rule: Screen prompt must be short and not a paragraph.
